phase: single (computed once at Stage 1; never revised)
aggregator: mean − 0.25 × (100 − min) within each role-block, applied across all CHECK_POINT-role points
global_gate_condition: every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_fix_type_score=0 (FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS) OR cp_position_sigma_score=0 (catastrophically bad sigma)
null_handling: Zero points with device_role=CHECK_POINT → check_point_score = null (not 0). FLAG: NO_DESIGNATED_CHECK_POINTS. Pre-processing handles the survey-design implication.
scope_note: Hardware-derived capture-confidence score for RTK check-point captures. Independent at runtime of base_station_score, gcp_score, and pre_processing_score — requires only per-point RTK device exports + check-point operation logs + check-point user input + NOAA Kp API. Survey-design adequacy (counts, role allocation, spatial independence from GCPs, geographic clustering, reference frame, geoid, base coordinate, processing role assignment) is owned by base_station_score, pre_processing_score, or future processing_score and surfaced only there.
source_file_set: RTK Device Export (per point), Operation Log (per point session), User Input form (per point). Flight timing from upload context. NOAA SWPC Kp index from external API.
known_limitations: False fix (wrong integer ambiguity resolution) is documented as CRITICAL but NOT detected from single-occupation data. Advisory flag CP_NO_REPEATABILITY_CHECK fires on every single-occupation point. Roadmap: when CBMI field workflow adds dual-occupation, repeatability_check_score becomes a real indicator. Sigma may be absent on third-party exports configured to omit precision columns — CP_SIGMA_NOT_EXPORTED flag tells user to re-export. Sigma may be N/A for devices that genuinely do not report it (rare) — weight redistributes within completeness category. Multipath detection is weaker than PPK because RTK captures instantaneous position, not extended observation variance. Kp ionospheric index under-detects equatorial scintillation (relevant for India); long-term roadmap to integrate S4/ROTI from regional reference. 9 catalog rows are dispositioned OWNED_BY_* (other subsystem) and are documented but not detected here. Runtime independence preserved. Antenna-height-missing gate dilutes via aggregation: one bad point in a fleet of N reduces check_point_score by (1/N) × the per-point penalty. Operator-declarative inputs (mark_integrity_confirmed, mark_photo_captured, tilt_compensation_used on non-tilt-comp gear) report documentation rigor, not field truth.
